Moments with You

♡

From My Heart

Words I could never say enough

On this beautiful day you came into the world, I am reminded every single day that you are the most extraordinary person I have ever known. Your smile is the light that makes every dark room feel warm. Your laughter is the melody I never want to stop hearing.

You wear your kindness like the most beautiful dress — it never goes out of style. You are breathtaking, not just in the way you look, but in the way you make every ordinary moment feel like magic.

I don't know how I got lucky enough to have you beside me, but I thank every star in the sky for you. This day, your day — I want you to feel every ounce of love I have for you.

Happy Birthday, my love. May this year bring you every dream you've dared to dream.

With all my love, forever yours ♡

My Wishes For You

Everything I pray for you, always

🌹

Endless Happiness

May every single morning greet you with joy, and every night bring you the peace you deserve.

✨

All Your Dreams

Every ambition, every hope, every dream you carry in your beautiful heart — may they all come true.

💫

Good Health

May your body be strong, your mind be clear, and your spirit be unbreakable through every season of life.

🌸

Love & Laughter

May your life be filled with people who love you deeply, and moments that make you laugh until your cheeks hurt.

🌟

Success

In everything you touch, may you find greatness. The world doesn't know yet how incredible you truly are.

🕊️

Peace of Mind

May you always find stillness within the chaos, and know that no matter what — you are enough, always.

✦
🌹

You Are My
Everything

Happiest Birthday to the girl who stole my heart and never gave it back — and I never want it back.
